creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text: A friend reports that x11-toolkits/linux-c6-tk85 builds in poudriere, although it fails to build locally as a non-privileged user.  This implies that poudriere is building ports as root.  This is undesirable because it fails to detect buggy ports like x11-toolkits/linux-c6-tk85 that will only build as root.
